issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity 'com.stripe.android.link.LinkRedirectHandlerActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'link-popup://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.

details.reason: Activity 'com.stripe.android.payments.StripeBrowserProxyReturnActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'stripesdk://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
